{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Departments – Grant Tracker{% endblock %} {% block content %} ← Dashboard

Departments

Departmental billing rates: a default monthly stipend (used to auto-fill new students in this department, but each student's stipend can still be edited individually), tuition remission (a flat $/month, prorated by allocation %), and a fringe benefit rate (% of stipend). Overhead/F&A rates are set per grant instead, since those are negotiated with each sponsor.

{% for d in departments %} {% else %} {% endfor %}
NameStipend / monthTuition / monthFringe rateSummer tuition
{{ d.name }} ${{ d.stipend_cents_per_month | money }} ${{ d.tuition_cents_per_month | money }} {{ d.fringe_rate_bps | rate }}% {{ "Charged" if d.tuition_charged_in_summer else "Not charged" }}
Edit
No departments yet.
Add department

Unchecking "Charge tuition in summer" zeroes the tuition component of cost projections for June, July, and August allocation months for students in that department. Stipend, fringe, and overhead are unaffected.

{% endblock %}
